trajectory.model_output:
<python_code>
import numpy as np

# Get poses and extents of the red and green cubes
red_center, _, red_extent = get_object_pose("red cube", return_bbox_extent=True)
green_center, _, green_extent = get_object_pose("green cube", return_bbox_extent=True)

# Sample grasp pose for the red cube (use this quaternion for both grasp and place)
grasp_pos, grasp_quat = sample_grasp_pose("red cube")

# Approach the red cube with z_approach=0.1
goto_pose(grasp_pos, grasp_quat, z_approach=0.1)

# Descend and close gripper to grasp
goto_pose(grasp_pos, grasp_quat)
close_gripper()

# Lift the red cube to a safe height
safe_height = grasp_pos[2] + 0.2
lift_pos = np.array([grasp_pos[0], grasp_pos[1], safe_height])
goto_pose(lift_pos, grasp_quat)

# Compute stacking position on top of the green cube
place_z = green_center[2] + green_extent[2]/2 + red_extent[2]/2
place_pos = np.array([green_center[0], green_center[1], place_z])

# Move laterally above the green cube, then approach downward with z_approach=0.1
goto_pose(place_pos, grasp_quat, z_approach=0.1)

# Final placement at computed height
goto_pose(place_pos, grasp_quat)

# Open gripper to release the red cube
open_gripper()

# Optionally lift up slightly after release
final_lift_pos = np.array([place_pos[0], place_pos[1], place_pos[2] + 0.1])
goto_pose(final_lift_pos, grasp_quat)
</python_code>

import numpy as np

# Get poses and extents of the red and green cubes
red_center, _, red_extent = get_object_pose("red cube", return_bbox_extent=True)
green_center, _, green_extent = get_object_pose("green cube", return_bbox_extent=True)

# Sample grasp pose for the red cube (use this quaternion for both grasp and place)
grasp_pos, grasp_quat = sample_grasp_pose("red cube")

# Approach the red cube with z_approach=0.1
goto_pose(grasp_pos, grasp_quat, z_approach=0.1)

# Descend and close gripper to grasp
goto_pose(grasp_pos, grasp_quat)
close_gripper()

# Lift the red cube to a safe height
safe_height = grasp_pos[2] + 0.2
lift_pos = np.array([grasp_pos[0], grasp_pos[1], safe_height])
goto_pose(lift_pos, grasp_quat)

# Compute stacking position on top of the green cube
place_z = green_center[2] + green_extent[2]/2 + red_extent[2]/2
place_pos = np.array([green_center[0], green_center[1], place_z])

# Move laterally above the green cube, then approach downward with z_approach=0.1
goto_pose(place_pos, grasp_quat, z_approach=0.1)

# Final placement at computed height
goto_pose(place_pos, grasp_quat)

# Open gripper to release the red cube
open_gripper()

# Optionally lift up slightly after release
final_lift_pos = np.array([place_pos[0], place_pos[1], place_pos[2] + 0.1])
goto_pose(final_lift_pos, grasp_quat)
